remember: Recall the concept of points, lines, and planes in 3D geometry
Identify the coordinates of points in 3D space
Determine the distance between two points in 3D space
Calculate the coordinates of the midpoint of a line segment in 3D space
understand: Understand the concept of direction ratios and direction cosines of a line in 3D space
Explain the concept of the equation of a line in 3D space
Relate the concept of the equation of a plane in 3D space
Interpret the concept of the distance of a point from a plane in 3D space
apply: Use the formula for the distance between two points in 3D space to solve problems
Apply the concept of direction ratios and direction cosines to find the equation of a line in 3D space
Use the equation of a plane in 3D space to solve problems
Calculate the distance of a point from a plane in 3D space
analyze: Analyze the relationship between the coordinates of points in 3D space and the distance between them
Compare the equations of lines and planes in 3D space to identify their properties
Evaluate the concept of direction ratios and direction cosines in 3D space
Explain the importance of the equation of a plane in 3D space in real-life applications

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the concepts of points, lines, and planes in 3D geometry.
To calculate the coordinates of the midpoint of a line segment in 3D space.
To determine the distance between two points in 3D space.
To find the equation of a line in 3D space using direction ratios and direction cosines.
board_exam_objectives: To calculate the distance between two points in 3D space (CBSE Board Exam Question)
To find the equation of a line in 3D space using direction ratios and direction cosines (CBSE Board Exam Question)
To determine the coordinates of the midpoint of a line segment in 3D space (CBSE Board Exam Question)
To explain the concept of the equation of a plane in 3D space (CBSE Board Exam Question)
